calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2025 Continued To Dec-10-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar May-08-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

Defendant US Bank National Association's Motion to Compel Arbitration and Stay Further Proceedings is GRANTED.

Defendant has established Plaintiff Benny Ignacio agreed to arbitrate with Defendant and the claims in the Complaint appear to be covered by the arbitration agreement; Plaintiff presented no evidence to the contrary and did not present evidence or argument in support of a defense against enforcement of the arbitration agreement. (See Gamboa v. Northeast Community Clinic (2021) 72 Cal.App.5th 158, 165.) The court, thus, grants the motion and orders Plaintiff to arbitrate his claims against Defendant. Further proceedings in this action are stayed pending the arbitration. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 1281.4; see also 9 U.S.C. section 3.)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
